# Jurepi

> Free online toolkit. No setup, no signup — open in browser and use instantly: random draws, glossaries, daily journals, and more.

## Tools

- [사다리타기 (Ghost Leg)](https://apps.jurepi.kr/ko/tools/ladder): Enter participants and outcomes, then use a fair ladder draw for random selection. Lottery, raffle, impartial drawing.
- [결정의 룰렛 (Decision Roulette)](https://apps.jurepi.kr/ko/tools/roulette): Add choices, assign optional weights, spin to decide fairly. Includes sequential draw mode, sound effects, and save/load option sets locally.
- [로또 번호 생성기 (Lotto Number Generator)](https://apps.jurepi.kr/ko/tools/lotto-generator): Generate fair lottery numbers with cryptographic randomness, optional fixed/excluded numbers, history tracking. No odds guarantee — for entertainment only.
- [신조어 용어사전 (New Word)](https://apps.jurepi.kr/ko/tools/new-word): Discover trending MZ slang and modern tech terms with meanings and examples in Korean and English side by side.
- [1일1질문 (Q&A a Day)](https://apps.jurepi.kr/ko/tools/qna-a-day): Answer one question daily and build a growing personal journal of reflections.
- [나이 계산기 (Age Calculator)](https://apps.jurepi.kr/ko/tools/age-calculator): Calculate your exact age in three ways: legal age (만 나이), calendar-year age, and traditional Korean counting age. See your zodiac sign, birth day of week, and days lived.
- [음력·양력 변환기 (Lunar-Solar Calendar Converter)](https://apps.jurepi.kr/ko/tools/lunar-converter): Convert between Gregorian and lunar calendar dates (1391–2050), explore the sexagenary (간지, 60-year cycle) and zodiac animals. Perfect for finding traditional Korean festival dates.
- [URL 인코더 (URL Encoder)](https://apps.jurepi.kr/ko/tools/url-encoder): Encode and decode URLs with UTF-8 and EUC-KR (CP949) charset support. Edit query parameters and handle percent-encoded characters instantly.
- [Base64 Encoder/Decoder (Base64 인코더/디코더)](https://apps.jurepi.kr/ko/tools/base64-encoder): Convert text and files to Base64 and back with UTF-8 safety. Standard and URL-safe variants, drag-drop file upload, copy and download buttons.
- [크론 표현식 해석기 (Cron Expression Parser)](https://apps.jurepi.kr/ko/tools/cron-parser): Decode Unix cron expressions to human-readable descriptions and compute upcoming run times in your timezone. Supports macros, timezone-aware DST handling, and preset expressions.
- [별별 랭킹 (Various Rankings)](https://apps.jurepi.kr/ko/tools/rankings): Curated Top N ranked lists across AI models, programming languages, movies, music, and more from trusted sources.
- [스피드퀴즈 제시어 (Speed Quiz Prompt Words)](https://apps.jurepi.kr/ko/tools/speed-quiz): Run a real-time party word-reveal game with category selection, difficulty levels, countdown timer, and score tracking. Perfect for classrooms, parties, and team events.
- [QR 코드 생성기 (QR Code Generator)](https://apps.jurepi.kr/ko/tools/qr-code): Generate QR codes from text, URLs, Wi-Fi details, emails, and contacts. Customize colors, choose error correction levels, and download as PNG or SVG.
- [배경 투명 만들기 (Transparent Background Maker)](https://apps.jurepi.kr/ko/tools/transparent-background): Remove solid-color backgrounds from product photos, logos, and scans instantly. 100% local processing, no upload, no external dependencies.
- [개발 인물 사전 (Developer People Dictionary)](https://apps.jurepi.kr/ko/tools/dev-people): Explore biographies and achievements of influential software engineers and computer scientists who shaped technology history. From programming language creators to open-source pioneers and architecture visionaries.
- [글자·단어 카운터 (Character & Word Counter)](https://apps.jurepi.kr/ko/tools/character-counter): Text metrics: character/word/sentence/paragraph/line/byte count, reading time, character limits.
- [문장 바꾸기 (Text Replacer)](https://apps.jurepi.kr/ko/tools/find-replace): Find and replace multiple words at once across a block of text. Stack many literal or regex rules that apply top-to-bottom, with live highlighted preview, per-rule counts, presets, and localStorage-saved rule-sets. Not an AI rewriter—pure client-side word substitution.
- [내 아이피 찾기 (My IP Address)](https://apps.jurepi.kr/ko/tools/my-ip): Find your public IP address (IPv4 and IPv6) instantly, with optional approximate geolocation and ISP information from a disclosed third-party IP lookup service. Jurepi never logs or stores your IP.
- [JSON 정렬 및 검증 (JSON Formatter & Validator)](https://apps.jurepi.kr/ko/tools/json-formatter): Format minified JSON, validate syntax, and find errors with precise line/column numbers. Minify, sort keys, download results. 100% browser-side processing—your data stays private.
- [뜨개 게이지 계산기 (Knitting Gauge Calculator)](https://apps.jurepi.kr/ko/tools/knitting-gauge): 게이지에서 필요한 코 수, 단 수, 패턴 환산을 계산합니다. 크기→코·단 수, 코·단 수→크기, 패턴 환산 모드 지원. cm/인치(2.54 정확 변환) 단위 변환. 로컬 스토리지에 최대 50개 게이지 저장.
- [하우투 가이드 (How-To Guides)](https://apps.jurepi.kr/ko/tools/howto): Step-by-step practical guides with code examples, images, diagrams, and syntax-highlighted code blocks. Install Claude Code, issue API tokens, learn Git workflows, deployment strategies, and development best practices.
- [JWT 디코더 (JWT Decoder)](https://apps.jurepi.kr/ko/tools/jwt-decoder): Decode JSON Web Tokens to inspect header, payload, and signature with a colorized view and a labeled standard-claims table (iss, sub, aud, exp, iat, nbf). Live validity countdown, unsecured "none" algorithm warning, and optional WebCrypto signature verification (HMAC HS256/384/512, RSA RS256, ECDSA ES256). Tokens and secrets never leave your browser—100% client-side, nothing stored or sent.
- [모두의 응원 (Everyone's Cheer)](https://apps.jurepi.kr/ko/tools/cheer): Show a cheer message big — turn any phrase into a full-screen banner with scrolling, flashing, or neon glow effects, adjustable colors and size, landscape rotation, and fullscreen so you can wave your phone like an LED sign at concerts, games, and events. Curated preset phrases for concerts, sports, birthdays, and events. 100% client-side — nothing is stored or sent.
- [즐겨찾기 (Curated Bookmarks)](https://apps.jurepi.kr/ko/tools/bookmarks): Browse trusted curated links across architecture, frontend engineering, design, prompt/context engineering, and AI agent tools, organized by topic with search and favorites.
- [맛집 리스트 (Restaurant List)](https://apps.jurepi.kr/ko/tools/restaurant-map): Explore curator-picked restaurants on an interactive map, filterable by curator, region, and category, with personal notes and directions for each place.
- [단위 변환기 (Unit Converter)](https://apps.jurepi.kr/ko/tools/unit-converter): Convert everyday measurements instantly across length, mass, temperature, area, volume, speed, digital storage, and time, with adjustable precision and recent-conversion history.

## About

- Run by Jurepi (individual). Free, ad-supported. No backend, no database — a static site.
